memoryArtifacts.headline: Joan, daughter and heir of William de Welles
memoryArtifacts.description: An inquisition post mortem proof of age document identifies Joan’s father as William de Welles, her mother as Agnes, and her husband as Henry de Coggeshale, son of John de Coggeshale.

popularStory.headline: Joan, daughter and heir of William de Welles
popularStory.description: An inquisition post mortem proof of age document identifies Joan’s father as William de Welles, her mother as Agnes, and her husband as Henry de Coggeshale, son of John de Coggeshale.

zh.Great Sampford, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 桑普福德
zh.Braintree, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可布萊崔
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Coggeshall於大約1331年出生在英國艾可可格沙拉爾時，他的父親John de Coggeshall32歲，母親Margaret Staunton23歲。他於1358年與Lady Joane de Welles在英國英格蘭艾可可格沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1375年9月29日在英國艾可布萊崔享年45歲，埋葬在英國艾可可格沙拉爾。

zh-hans.Great Sampford, Essex, England: 英国艾可格亞特 桑普福德
zh-hans.Braintree, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可布萊崔
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Coggeshall于大约1331年出生在英国艾可可格沙拉爾时，他的父亲John de Coggeshall32岁，母亲Margaret Staunton23岁。他于1358年与Lady Joane de Welles在英国英格兰艾可可格沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1375年9月29日在英国艾可布萊崔享年45岁，埋葬在英国艾可可格沙拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Coggeshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): habitational name from Coggeshall in Essex, named from an Old English personal name Cogg + halh ‘nook’.

History: This name was taken to America in 1632 by John Coggeshall, who became first governor of RI, and in 1635 by John Cogswell. In 1887 a descendant, Daniel Cogswell, founded Cogswell College, San Francisco.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Coggeshall was born about 1331, in Coggeshall, Essex, England, his father, John de Coggeshall, was 32 and his mother, Margaret Staunton, was 23. He married Lady Joane de Welles in 1358, in Coggeshall, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 29 September 1375, in Braintree, Essex, England, at the age of 45, and was buried in Coggeshall, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Coggeshall est né environ 1331, à Coggeshall, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John de Coggeshall, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Staunton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joane de Welles en 1358, à Coggeshall, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1375, à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Coggeshall, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Coggeshall um 1331 in Coggeshall, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Coggeshall 32 und seine Mutter Margaret Staunton 23. Er hat 1358 in Coggeshall, Essex, England, United Kingdom Lady Joane de Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 29. September 1375 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Braintree, Essex, England und wurde in Coggeshall, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Coggeshall è nato il circa 1331 nel Coggeshall, Essex, England, il suo padre, John de Coggeshall, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Staunton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joane de Welles nel 1358, nel Coggeshall, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 29 settembre 1375, nel Braintree, Essex, England, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Coggeshall, Essex, England.

ja.Coggeshall, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスコグジェシャル
ja.Great Sampford, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスグレアト サンプフォード
ja.Braintree, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスブレイントレ
ja.Sandon, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスサンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Coggeshallが約1331年にイギリスエセックスコグジェシャルで生まれた時，父John de Coggeshallは32歳，母Margaret Stauntonは23歳であった。1358年にイギリスイギリスエセックスコグジェシャルでLady Joane de Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1375年9月29日にイギリスエセックスブレイントレで45歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスコグジェシャルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Coggeshall(이)가 대략 1331년 영국 에세스 코그샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Coggeshall(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Staunton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코그샤에서 Lady Joane de Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1375년 9월 29일 영국 에세스 브레이트리에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 코그샤에 묻혔다.

mn.Braintree, Essex, England: Braintree, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Sandon, Essex, England: Sandon, Ēastseaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Coggeshall nasceu aproximadamente 1331, em Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Coggeshall, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Staunton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Joane de Welles em 1358, em Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1375, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Coggeshall родился около 1331 г. в местности когешолл, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Coggeshall было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Staunton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Joane de Welles в 1358 г. в местности когешолл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 29 сентября 1375 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности когешолл, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Coggeshall nació aproximadamente 1331, en Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Coggeshall, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Staunton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Joane de Welles en 1358, en Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1375, en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Coggeshall, Essex, Inglaterra.
